pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when your team needs more.

free.name: Free
free.description: For individual developers exploring security scanning.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: For developers who need full scanning power and AI features.

team.name: Team
team.description: For teams that need collaboration and shared security oversight.

faq.q: Can I use VEXLIT for free?
faq.a: Yes. The Free plan includes 3 projects and 10 scans per month with full SAST rule coverage. No credit card required.

faq.q: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a: We accept all major credit and debit cards through Stripe. Invoicing is available for Team plans.
Yes. You can cancel your subscription at any time. You'll continue to have access until the end of your billing period.

faq.q: What happens when I exceed the Free plan limits?
faq.a: You'll be prompted to upgrade. Your existing scan history and results are always preserved.

faq.q: Is the CLI still free and open source?
faq.a: Yes. The CLI and core engine remain MIT-licensed and free to use locally or in CI/CD. The web dashboard plans add cloud features.

pricing.ctaDescription: Start scanning for free. No credit card required.
